finding_results.notes: Removed the parked-call refusal beat and moved the first ignored Nora call into the interstate commitment sequence; the refusal now lands once, directly before 'He kept going.'
Replaced euphemistic hinge language with explicit accountability (fund transfer, deception, job/audit abandonment, mortgage and tuition impact) and added embodied stress markers (sweat/pulse).
Inserted a concrete near-confession tied to current stakes and paired it with an immediate physical reaction before Eli deflects back into the goodbye exchange.

summary: All three structural/craft findings were resolved with localized revisions that sharpen causality, restore concrete stakes, and preserve chapter continuity/voice constraints.
